title: Urgent Opening Teacher at Delhi University Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Teacher at Delhi University Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Delhi University Digital Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Teacher for our Jabalpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Delhi University Digital Technologies:
Delhi University Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Support students with special educational needs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Educational Technology

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Delhi University Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
